display.purpose: Public-page hero titles and rare empty states.

headline.purpose: Application page titles and report summaries.

label.purpose: Controls, navigation, form labels, and status text.

metric.purpose: Scores, timings, counts, IDs, and technical measurements.

shadows.name: surface-lift
shadows.purpose: Large primary surfaces that need separation from the canvas.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Most visibility and focus state transitions.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Sheets and dialogs; never decorative choreography.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Responsive state entry and overlay movement.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The dominant action within a local task region.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height:44px; padding:10px 16px; border:1px solid #2563EB; border-radius:8px; background:#2563EB; color:#fff; font:600 14px/1.4 'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; transition:background 180ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1),transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#1D4ED8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A supporting action that does not compete with the primary task.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { min-height:44px; padding:10px 16px; border:1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius:8px; background:#fff; color:#0F172A; font:600 14px/1.4 'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; transition:background 180ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1),border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background:#F1F5F9; border-color:#CBD5E1; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background:#E2E8F0; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: A persistent-label field for profile and setup data.
components.css: .ds-field { display:grid; gap:6px; color:#0F172A; font:500 14px/1.4 'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height:44px; padding:10px 12px; border:1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius:8px; background:#fff; color:#0F172A; font:400 16px/1.5 'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; transition:border-color 180ms,box-shadow 180ms; } .ds-field input:hover { border-color:#CBD5E1; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset:2px; } .ds-field small { color:#475569; font-weight:400; }

components.name: Progress Card
components.description: A top-level summary surface; it is never nested inside another card.
components.html:
Average score72%

Up 8% across the last eight weeks.
components.css: .ds-card { width:260px; padding:24px; border:1px solid #E2E8F0; border-radius:12px; background:#fff; color:#0F172A; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,.04),0 8px 24px rgba(15,23,42,.05); font-family:'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; transition:border-color 180ms; } .ds-card:hover { border-color:#CBD5E1; } .ds-card:focus-within { outline:2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset:2px; } .ds-card-label { display:block; margin-bottom:8px; color:#475569; font-size:14px; } .ds-card strong { display:block; font:600 30px/1.2 'Geist Mono',Consolas,monospace; } .ds-card p { margin:8px 0 0; color:#475569; font-size:14px; line-height:1.5; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: A semantic state that combines color with an explicit label.
components.html: Completed
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:5px 9px; border-radius:999px; background:#DCFCE7; color:#166534; font:600 12px/1.3 'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; transition:background 150ms; } .ds-chip:hover { background:#BBF7D0; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Active Navigation Item
components.description: Icon-plus-text navigation with an explicit current-page state.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:10px 12px; border-radius:8px; background:#DBEAFE; color:#1D4ED8; text-decoration:none; font:600 14px/1.4 'Geist Sans',Arial,sans-serif; transition:background 180ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background:#BFDBFE; } .ds-nav-item:active { background:#93C5FD; } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #2563EB; outline-offset:2px; }

narrative.overview: InterviewForge should feel like a well-prepared coaching workspace: bright, orderly, specific, and supportive. The visual system recedes behind the practice task while preserving enough warmth to make difficult feedback feel actionable. Predictable grids, restrained Forge Blue, precise Geist typography, and generous breathing room create trust without making the interface sterile. This is a light-first product system for sustained laptop use. Information density may increase on dashboards and reports, but the current task must always remain obvious.
keyCharacteristics: Familiar product navigation and clear information hierarchy.
Evidence-led feedback with restrained semantic color.
Flat surfaces separated primarily by space, tint, and one-pixel borders.
Responsive, keyboard-friendly layouts with state-only motion.

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: Forge Blue is reserved for primary action, selection, focus, recording, links, and progress; it is never background decoration.

rules.name: The Named State Rule
rules.body: Green, amber, red, and violet must always appear with a label, icon, pattern, or explanatory text.

rules.name: The Light-First Rule
rules.body: Dark mode, near-black panels, neon accents, and decorative gradients are prohibited in the MVP.

rules.name: The Product Scale Rule
rules.body: Use fixed sizes, not fluid application typography. A heading that changes size because it moves into a sidebar is a failure.

rules.name: The Mono Precision Rule
rules.body: Geist Mono is limited to metrics, timings, identifiers, counts, and code-like content; it never carries paragraphs.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting controls and nested content do not receive shadows. If every region appears to float, the hierarchy has failed.

rules.name: The No Card-in-Card Rule
rules.body: Use headings, dividers, lists, and whitespace inside a surface; nested cards are prohibited.

dos: Do reserve Forge Blue for primary action, selection, focus, recording, links, and meaningful progress.
Do use whitespace, section headings, one-pixel borders, and Slate Wash before adding another card.
Do pair scores, strengths, weaknesses, and chart series with labels or icons so color is never the only signal.
Do use 150–250ms state transitions on opacity, color, and transform and honor prefers-reduced-motion.
Do preserve a text fallback beside every browser-native voice interaction.
Do keep 5-question and 10-question formats explicit throughout setup and the interview room.
donts: Don't make InterviewForge look like a neon AI product: purple gradients, glowing controls, glassmorphism, and magic visual language are prohibited.
Don't make it look like a gaming dashboard: no streak pressure, points, leaderboards, confetti, or decorative progress theatrics.
Don't make it look like a corporate HR portal: avoid bureaucratic density, judgmental copy, and cold data walls.
Don't use a generic SaaS landing-page cliché: no oversized empty claims, endless identical card grids, or decorative AI art.
Don't create a dark-mode-first developer tool. Dark mode is outside the MVP.
Don't use gradient text, decorative gradients, decorative glow, nested cards, side-stripe accent borders, custom scrollbars, or decorative motion.
Don't create a job-description PDF upload control; the MVP accepts pasted job-description text only.
